supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on tenants paying rent and maintaining lease obligations
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions affecting construction materials and tenant build-outs, labor shortages, increased material costs due to inflation

regulatory_risks: Federal, state and local environmental, health, safety and similar laws compliance
Americans with Disabilities Act compliance requirements
Energy and emissions regulations in certain jurisdictions with potential fines for exceeding limits
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code Section 856(c)
Requirement to distribute at least 90% of taxable income to maintain REIT status
State and local licensing requirements, consumer protection laws, fire and life-safety requirements
Climate change legislation requiring capital expenditures for energy efficiency
Zoning and regulatory restrictions on property use
